listings.name: Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
listings.description: Full-service 24-hour travel center at I-65 Exit 22 (US-31A, Cornersville). Established 1974 as The Tennessean Truck Stop; rebuilt after a fire and reopened/rebranded in June 2026 as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop. Amenities include 24-hour diesel, restaurant/deli, convenience store, showers, laundry, CAT Scale, tire repair, truck repairs, RV parking and Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 100 truck parking spaces, 5 fuel lanes and 4 showers.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices and TruckMap agree on 3686 Pulaski Hwy, Cornersville 37047, I-65 Exit 22, 100 spaces/5 lanes/4 showers, CAT Scale and 24-hour operation. WSMV News and PR Newswire confirm the rebuild and June 2026 reopening as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop (formerly The Tennessean Truck Stop, est. 1974). Official brand sites dollystravelstops.com and tennesseantravelstop.com were egress-blocked to the fetcher; identity confirmed via news + directories.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop (formerly The Tennessean Truck Stop) at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. Available with the travel stop's 24-hour operation.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices lists 'CAT Scales' and 'Scales - Certified' in the Tennessean amenity set at Exit 22; an iExit amenity listing corroborates CAT Scales at the Tennessean. The official catscale.com locator was egress-blocked, so the national CAT Scale site is used for contact; no separate facility phone confirmed.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #406
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 22 (US-31, Cornersville). Amenities include 24-hour diesel, DEF, convenience store, deli, showers, ATM, Western Union, CAT Scale, RV parking and Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 20 truck parking spaces, 5 fuel lanes and 2 showers.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices, FindFuelStops, FindTruckService and Yelp agree on Pilot #406, 9211 Lewisburg Hwy, Cornersville 37047, phone 931-363-3290, I-65 Exit 22, 20 spaces/5 lanes/2 showers and CAT Scale. Official Pilot Flying J location page was egress-blocked to the fetcher but corroborated by four independent directories.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #406
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #406 at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. Available with the travel center's 24-hour operation.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices lists CAT scales at Pilot #406, and 4RoadService lists a CAT Scale provider in Cornersville at the Pilot location. Official catscale.com locator egress-blocked; national CAT Scale site used for contact, no separate facility phone confirmed.

listings.name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop
listings.description: Independent 24-hour truck stop at I-65 Exit 6 (TN-273/Bryson Rd, Elkton), known for its 'Big Chicken' restaurant. Amenities include 24-hour diesel, restaurant, convenience/trucker store, showers, laundry, ATM, certified scales, RV parking, trailer drop, a trucker's lounge, Wi-Fi, 4 truck service bays and on-site tire/truck repair. Directories list roughly 42 truck parking spaces, 4 fuel lanes and 4 showers on a lighted, paved lot.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices, AllStays and ParkAdvisor agree on 1371 Bryson Rd, Elkton 38449, phone 931-468-0601, I-65 Exit 6, 42 spaces/4 lanes/4 showers, certified scales and 4 service bays. Tripadvisor and Humanities Tennessee corroborate the location and the 'Big Chicken' restaurant. Facility has certified (non-CAT) scales, so no CAT Scale row is created.

listings.name: Shady Lawn Truck Stop Tire & Repair
listings.description: On-site commercial tire and truck-repair service at Shady Lawn Truck Stop, I-65 Exit 6, Elkton. Offers tire repair/sales (Bandag, Bridgestone, Firestone, Goodyear, Michelin) and truck repairs across 4 service bays, available with the truck stop's 24-hour operation.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices and AllStays both list tire repair (Bandag/Bridgestone/Firestone/Goodyear/Michelin) and 4 truck service bays at Shady Lawn Truck Stop, Exit 6, Elkton; co-located distinct tire/repair service.

listings.name: Motel 6 Pulaski, TN
listings.description: Budget motel at I-65 Exit 14 (US-64, Pulaski) offering free on-site car and truck parking. Amenities include free Wi-Fi, a 24-hour front desk, laundry facilities and an on-site restaurant (Nick's Grill); pet-friendly.
listings.corroboration: Motel 6 official site, iExit and HotelPlanner agree on 2400 US-64 East, Pulaski 38478, I-65 Exit 14; iExit confirms free car and truck parking on site. Truck-space count not published, left blank.

listings.name: Tennessee Welcome Center - I-65 (Ardmore, Northbound)
listings.description: TDOT Tennessee Welcome Center on I-65 northbound near mile marker 3 in Ardmore (at the Alabama state line, Giles County). Open 24 hours with restrooms, water, picnic tables and separate truck/passenger parking. Signed 2-hour parking limit; overnight parking is not allowed.
listings.hold_reason: Direction (northbound, MM ~3) and truck access are confirmed, but posted rules prohibit overnight parking (2-hour limit), so it does not fit an overnight truck-parking listing. Held per conservative rest-area/welcome-center rule.
listings.corroboration: TennesseeRestAreas and RestAreas.org agree on a northbound-only welcome center at I-65 MM ~3.1, Ardmore 38449, open 24h with separate truck/passenger parking, 2-hour limit and no overnight parking; TNVacation (official) confirms the Ardmore/Giles County welcome center. Overnight prohibition confirmed, so held.

listings.name: TDOT I-65 Truck Parking Area (former Northbound Weigh Station, Giles County)
listings.description: During TDOT's I-65 Phase 1 widening (south of SR 25 to south of SR 109, completed September 2024), a former northbound weigh station in Giles County was converted into a truck parking area. Exact mile marker/exit, capacity and overnight-parking rules are not confirmed from an official source.
listings.hold_reason: TDOT project reporting confirms a NB weigh station was converted to truck parking, but exact location (MM/exit), space count and legal overnight-parking status could not be independently confirmed from an official TDOT source (tn.gov pages were egress-blocked).
listings.corroboration: America's Transportation Awards writeup of TDOT's I-65 widening states Phase 1 converted a northbound weigh station into a truck parking area (completed Sept 2024); TruckMap references the NB scale house location near Ardmore. Location/capacity/overnight details unconfirmed, held.

listings.name: I-65 Giles County Weigh Station (Northbound, Ardmore)
listings.description: Tennessee Highway Patrol commercial-vehicle scale complex historically listed on I-65 northbound near mile marker 5-6 in Giles County (Ardmore). Operational status is uncertain: TDOT's 2021-2024 I-65 widening reportedly converted a northbound weigh station in this area into a truck parking area, while THP CVE listings still reference a Giles County scale house.
listings.hold_reason: Conflicting information on current operating status: TDOT widening reporting says a NB weigh station here was converted to truck parking (completed Sept 2024), yet directory/THP references still list a Giles County scale house. Official THP CVE page (tn.gov) was egress-blocked, so permanent/operational status and exact direction/MM could not be independently confirmed.
listings.corroboration: TruckMap and TruckerGuide reference a NB scale house near Ardmore (MM ~5.5, phone 931-424-0420), but TDOT widening reporting indicates a NB weigh station in this stretch was converted to truck parking. Because current operating status conflicts and the official THP CVE page could not be fetched, held pending confirmation.

excluded.name: Love's / Petro / TA-Petro (Ardmore-Pulaski-Cornersville)
excluded.reason: No Love's, Petro or TA/Petro could be confirmed on I-65 within exits 1-27; nearest confirmed Love's on I-65 TN is well north (Columbia/Exit 108 area), out of segment. No verifiable in-segment listing found.

excluded.name: Quik Mart (424 N Main St)
excluded.reason: In-town convenience store roughly 2.5 miles from I-65 Exit 27, not at the interstate and not a verified truck facility.

excluded.name: Nick's Grill
excluded.reason: On-site restaurant at Motel 6 Pulaski, not a distinct freight-service facility; captured within the Motel 6 listing.

excluded.name: East Tennessee I-75 production listings
excluded.reason: No overlap; all 61 existing TN production listings are on the I-75 East Tennessee corridor, none in this Middle/South TN I-65 segment.
